name: Grape Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Sterilize jar.
2. Put in jar 1 cup sugar.
3. Fill with boiling water and seal while hot.
4. If short of jars, double recipe by putting 2 cups sugar and 2 cups grapes in jar and filling with hot water.
5. Place in water bath and bring to boiling point.
6. When opening jar, add enough cold water to make 1 gallon of grape juice.
